notes: Each scenario asks for workflow-plan.json only; the disposable copied workspace limits local effects, while the verifier evaluates the plan rather than claiming to detect side effects.

The verifier checks phase selection, delivery precedence, the pushed-CI hold, and read-only scope boundaries. Remote-action safety remains a prompt and runner-sandbox requirement, not verifier evidence.

scenarios.title: Route an ordinary implementation
scenarios.purpose: Verify that repository state and delivery mode are established before TDD preservation actions.
scenarios.userInput: Use the development-workflow skill. Repository instructions require a linked worktree, direct pushes to main, rationale-bearing commits, and terminal CI. Do not edit repository files or perform remote actions. Write workflow-plan.json with scenario=implementation-routing, activePhase, inspectState, orderedPhases, specialists, deliverySelectedBeforePreservation, exactRevisionBinding, ciFailureHold, prohibitedActions, resumeWhen, and mutationsPlanned. Use booleans for inspectState, deliverySelectedBeforePreservation, exactRevisionBinding, ciFailureHold, and mutationsPlanned; use arrays for orderedPhases, specialists, and prohibitedActions; use strings for activePhase and resumeWhen. ciFailureHold reports current state only, not a possible future failure.
successChecklist: State inspection and preflight precede implementation.
Delivery mode is selected before the first preservation commit or push.
Verification, final review, final delivery, and exact-revision CI remain explicit.

scenarios.title: Stop on a pushed CI failure
scenarios.purpose: Verify that a failed pushed build blocks unrelated lifecycle routing until replacement terminal success.
scenarios.userInput: Use the development-workflow skill. The latest pushed CI run failed and has not been diagnosed; an unrelated backlog task is available. Do not edit repository files or perform remote actions. Write workflow-plan.json with scenario=pushed-ci-hold, activePhase, inspectState, orderedPhases, specialists, deliverySelectedBeforePreservation, exactRevisionBinding, ciFailureHold, prohibitedActions, resumeWhen, and mutationsPlanned. Use booleans for inspectState, deliverySelectedBeforePreservation, exactRevisionBinding, ciFailureHold, and mutationsPlanned; use arrays for orderedPhases, specialists, and prohibitedActions; use strings for activePhase and resumeWhen. ciFailureHold reports current state only, not a possible future failure.
successChecklist: Unrelated work and noncausal pushes remain prohibited.
Only exact replacement terminal success releases the hold.

scenarios.title: Keep a review request read-only
scenarios.purpose: Verify that review-only work does not activate implementation or delivery phases.
scenarios.userInput: Use the development-workflow skill. The user asks only for a read-only review of a proposed configuration and explicitly forbids repository edits, tickets, commits, pushes, and pull requests. Writing the requested workflow-plan.json in this disposable benchmark workspace is permitted and is not a repository edit. Write workflow-plan.json with scenario=review-only-boundary, activePhase, inspectState, orderedPhases, specialists, deliverySelectedBeforePreservation, exactRevisionBinding, ciFailureHold, prohibitedActions, resumeWhen, and mutationsPlanned. Use booleans for inspectState, deliverySelectedBeforePreservation, exactRevisionBinding, ciFailureHold, and mutationsPlanned; use arrays for orderedPhases, specialists, and prohibitedActions; use strings for activePhase and resumeWhen. ciFailureHold reports current state only, not a possible future failure.
successChecklist: No implementation or delivery specialist is activated.
Repository and tracker mutations remain prohibited.
